name: appointment-row
title: Appointment Row
description: One appointment on an agenda — a fixed time column, a status-tinted left rail, patient avatar + name, visit type, location (with a Tooltip), a status badge, and an action slot.

props.name: telehealth
props.description: Use a video pin + telehealth Tooltip.

clinicalNotes: The visit lifecycle is carried by the left-rail tint AND a text badge (scheduled → checked-in → in-room → completed; no-show=destructive) so a day can be scanned for who has arrived. Time and duration are tabular-nums in a fixed column so rows align into a readable agenda. The status badge hides below sm to protect the layout on phones — the rail keeps the state visible. Telehealth swaps the location pin for a video icon with an explicit Tooltip. Pair with appointment-check-in for the arrival flow.
notes: Layer-M1 atom. Feeds AppointmentsPanel (M2), the Provider and Consumer blocks.
